items.prompt:
abandoned brutalist observatory on a volcanic plateau at dusk,
  concrete ramp winding between obsidian rocks, thin veins of molten
  lava glowing warm amber in the cracks, a single geodesic dome in
  the distance catching the last orange sunlight, deep indigo sky
  fading to near-black overhead, faint stars emerging, soft volumetric
  haze, cinematic editorial photography, matte natural tones,
  no people, no text, no visible seams at the horizon
